features: GLAMOROUS DESIGN: Add a touch of elegance to your special day with our glitz rose gold, gold & silver "happy birthday" candle set, making your celebration truly unforgettable.

PREMIUM WAX MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality wax, our birthday candles ensure a clean, even burn that lasts throughout the celebration, providing a beautiful and memorable touch to your special day.

PERFECT FOR MEMORABLE CELEBRATIONS: Make your birthday party unforgettable with our chic and sophisticated glitz candle set, an ideal choice for milestone birthdays, surprise parties, family gatherings, and more.
EASY TO USE & VERSATILE: Simply insert the candles into your cake, light them up with ease, and enjoy the warm glow of our glitz candle set, suitable for all types of birthday cakes and desserts.

1 PACK, ENDLESS JOY: With our 1-pack candle set, you'll have everything you need to make your birthday celebration shine. Be ready to capture smiles and joy as you present a cake adorned with our glitz rose gold gold & silver "happy birthday" candle set.
description: Make your dessert look extra special with our Rose Gold Glitz birthday cake topper & birthday candle set! Great for any birthday party, This cake decorating set includes 12 spiral candles and 1 “happy birthday” pick candle. Place the cake topper in the center and surround it with as many candles as you desire. Spiral candles measure 2.5" Tall and pick candle measures 3" Tall.
